---
title: "cmass_reference_displacement_coor"
generated: true
description: "Alias for displacement_from_reference_points."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.coords`](../nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cmass_reference_displacement_coor -->
`cmass_reference_displacement_coor` is an alias for [`displacement_from_reference_points`](displacement_from_reference_points.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
